ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code where the restaurant is located */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the restaurant is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the restaurant */,
  "locality_verbose" TEXT /* Verbose locality of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant location */,
  "cuisines" TEXT /* Cuisines offered by the restaurant */,
  "average_cost_for_two" INTEGER /* Average cost for two people */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used */,
  "has_table_booking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has table booking */,
  "has_online_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has online delivery */,
  "price_range" INTEGER /* Price range of the restaurant (1-4) */,
  "aggregate_rating" REAL /* Aggregate rating of the restaurant */,
  "rating_color" TEXT /* Color of the rating (e.g., Dark Green, Green) */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Text description of the rating (e.g., Excellent, Very Good) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes or reviews for the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the restaurant */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant-cuisine association */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_cuisines_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_cuisines_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the restaurant data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Numeric rating given by the user */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Text description of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Detailed review text given by the user */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON representation of the restaurant data at that version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_versions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
